title: Hipgnosis Songs publishes Blackstone deal letter but 'deal looks dead' say analysts
text: Hipgnosis Songs Fund Limited (LSE:SONG) has published a promised letter to shareholders about its proposed US$440 million music rights sale but the deal could be as dead as the company's prostrate elephant logo, according to analysts. After missed yesterday's scheduled publication date, the fund issued a statement this morning saying the circular for the proposed deal has been approved by the UK Financial Conduct Authority and now been published.

title: Blackstone Surges From A Solid Foundation (Technical Analysis)
text: Blackstone has shown strong financial performance in Q2 2023, with improvements in various metrics and significant growth in asset management. The company's financial position in different segments suggests sustained profitability in the future. The stock price of BX demonstrates a robust revival within a pronounced bullish trajectory, indicating potential investment opportunities for long-term investors.

title: Blackstone Stock: 3 Reasons To Sell It Right Now
text: Blackstone stock has delivered strong returns and has $1 trillion in assets under management. That said, we believe that there are three compelling reasons to sell the stock right now. We also discuss what we would do with the proceeds from selling BX stock.

title: SEC intensifies probe of Wall Street's WhatsApp usage
text: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has escalated its investigation into Wall Street's use of private messaging applications, collecting thousands of staff messages from over a dozen major investment companies. As per Reuters, the SEC's heightened scrutiny is aimed at assessing potential breaches of record-keeping rules and ensuring compliance within the financial sector.

title: SEC obtains thousands of Wall Street staffers' WhatsApp messages as probe widens: sources
text: In the latest phase of the probe of more than a dozen investment advisers, the SEC has in recent months asked for messages on personal devices or applications during the first half of 2021 that discuss business, sources said.

title: This Insurer Just Got Booted From the S&P 500: Here's Why
text: Lincoln National was recently removed from the S&P 500 index and replaced by Blackstone. The insurer struggled during the pandemic, and other issues compounded its troubles over the last year.

title: Star Mountain Capital Adds Former Blackstone Director, Michael Goldstein to Portfolio Management Team
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Star Mountain Capital, LLC ("Star Mountain"), a specialized investment manager with approximately $3.5 billion in assets under management (committed capital including debt facilities as of 8/31/2023) focused on investing in established, private small and medium-sized businesses in the North American lower middle-market, is pleased to announce that Michael Goldstein has joined as a Director focused on portfolio management, investments, risk management, valuations and r.

title: How Blackstone celebrated S&P 500 inclusion
text: Blackstone CEO Steve Schwarzman joined the firm's employees in celebrating a a prestigious milestone for the private equity giant.

title: SYF vs. BX: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?
text: Investors interested in Financial - Miscellaneous Services stocks are likely familiar with Synchrony (SYF) and Blackstone Inc. (BX). But which of these two companies is the best option for those looking for undervalued stocks?

title: Here's Why 1 Investment Bank Says Blackstone Just Hit a "Major Milestone"
text: Blackstone is one of the largest asset managers in the world. Its alternative investments have drawn interest from institutional investors and pension funds looking to diversify their assets.

title: Blackstone (BX) Combines Its Credit and Insurance Groups
text: Blackstone (BX) integrates its credit, asset-based finance and insurance groups into a single unit called Blackstone Credit & Insurance.

title: Blackstone to acquire song rights from listed Hipgnosis fund
text: Global asset manager The Blackstone Group (NYSE:BX) will acquire rights to a catalogue of best-selling songs by artists such as the Rolling Stones from a UK-based listed fund run by investment adviser Hipgnosis Song Management Ltd.   According to a statement, a swathe of song rights held by the investment adviser's publicly listed music intellectual property fund will be sold to a private vehicle it owns with the private-equity firm.

title: Blackstone Integrates Leading Credit and Insurance Businesses to Form Blackstone Credit and Insurance (BXCI) in Push Toward Next $1 Trillion
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Blackstone (NYSE: BX) announced today the integration of its market-leading corporate credit, asset-based finance, and insurance groups into a single new unit, Blackstone Credit & Insurance (BXCI). Credit and Insurance is Blackstone's fastest-growing segment – more than doubling to $295 billion in assets under management over the last three years. Today, Blackstone's market-leading businesses include: the largest BDC (BCRED), largest private credit energy transiti.

title: 7 Stocks to Invest In for Big-Time, Long-Term Gains
text: Here's a look at seven stocks to buy and hold onto for the long haul. Tech stocks aren't the only drivers of wealth in today's economy, although many may be quick to tell you otherwise.

title: Blackstone exit bodes well for London Stock Exchange Group, say analysts
text: Blackstone's continued divestment in its stake in capital markets and data company London Stock Exchange Group PLC (LSE:LSEG) is serving as a “positive catalyst for LSEG shares”, according to UBS analysts. Announced today, Blackstone is set to finalise its third round of LSEG share disposals through the sale of 43.1 million shares, thereby reducing Blackstone's total ownership in LSEG to 10.7%, down from 18.4%.

title: Blackstone: S&P 500 Inclusion Deserved, Big Growth Expected In 2024
text: Blackstone Inc. and Airbnb are set to join the S&P 500, causing a rally in their stocks. Newly-included SPX stocks often underperform in the short run, though. Blackstone's valuation, growth trajectory, and technical upside potential make it a buy, despite potential short-term performance concerns.

title: Blackstone Inc. (BX) Soars 3.6%: Is Further Upside Left in the Stock?
text: Blackstone Inc. (BX) saw its shares surge in the last session with trading volume being higher than average. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions could translate into further price increase in the near term.

title: Apollo, KKR Could Join S&P 500 After Blackstone, Says Analyst
text: Wells Fargo analyst Finian O'Shea reaffirmed bullish views on KKR and Apollo Management stock, noting they could join the index.

title: Blackstone marks ‘another important milestone' with S&P 500 inclusion
text: Blackstone Inc.'s BX, +3.32% inclusion in the S&P 500 SPX, -0.36% marks “another important milestone” for the private equity firm, after it crossed $1 trillion in assets under management in July, a spokesperson for the firm said in an email to MarketWatch. “We are gratified to be joining the S&P 500 and pleased that this will make our stock even easier for shareholders to access,” the spokesperson said.

title: Airbnb stock jumps as it books a place with Blackstone on S&P 500
text: Airbnb Inc (NASDAQ:ABNB) stock jumped in Tuesday pre-market trading after it secured a position on the S&P 500 index along with Blackstone Inc as part of S&P Indices quarterly rebalance. Ahead of the opening bell, Airbnb traded 6% higher at $140.44 while Blackstone was 3.4% up at $108.

title: Airbnb and Blackstone shares rise on S&P 500 inclusion, and other stocks on the move
text: Shares of Blackstone Inc. BX, -1.77% rose 4%, while shares of Airbnb Inc. ABNB, +0.87% were rising 5% after S&P Dow Jones Indices announced that both names would gain inclusion into the S&P 500. The changes take effect before the start of trading Sept.

title: Blackstone (BX) to be Added to S&P 500 Index Post Rebalancing
text: Blackstone (BX) is joining the S&P 500 index prior to the start of trading on Sep 18, replacing Lincoln National.

title: Blackstone and Airbnb Set to Join S&P 500; Others to Join S&P 100, S&P MidCap 400 and S&P SmallCap 600
text: NEW YORK , Sept. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- S&P Dow Jones Indices ("S&P DJI") will make the following changes to the S&P 500, S&P 100, S&P MidCap 400 and S&P SmallCap 600 indices effective prior to the open of trading on Monday, September 18, to coincide with the quarterly rebalance.

title: Blackstone Stock Jumps After Getting Added to the S&P 500
text: It replaces Lincoln National in the popular index.

title: Airbnb, Blackstone to join S&P 500, while Deere will replace Walgreens in S&P 100
text: Blackstone Inc. BX, -1.77% and Airbnb Inc. ABNB, +0.87% will join the S&P 500 index SPX, +0.18% before trading opens on Sept. 18, replacing Lincoln National Corp. LNC, +2.14% and Newell Brands Inc. NWL, +1.23%, S&P Dow Jones Indices said on Friday.
